title.en: China-to-Australia Food-Contact Materials Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国食品接触材料进入澳大利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國食品接觸材料進入澳洲：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese food-contact material requirements against the Australian framework, including the FSANZ Food Standards Code, state and territory Food Acts, food safety standards in Chapter 3, contaminant limits in Standard 1.4.1, and the voluntary-referenced AS 2070 plastics standard.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国食品接触材料要求与澳大利亚框架对照，涵盖FSANZ《食品标准法典》、州和领地《食品法》、第3章食品安全标准、标准1.4.1污染物限量，以及自愿引用的AS 2070塑料标准。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國食品接觸材料要求與澳洲框架對照，涵蓋FSANZ《食品標準法典》、州和領地《食品法》、第3章食品安全標準、標準1.4.1污染物限量，以及自願引用的AS 2070塑料標準。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid for food-contact material exporters considering the Australian market. It is not legal advice, a regulatory determination, a conformity assessment, a certification decision, or a guarantee of market access. Australian food-contact material obligations are distributed across the Food Standards Code, state and territory food legislation, product safety law, and contractual or retailer specifications. Manufacturers, importers, and distributors should verify current law, standards, test methods, and enforcement expectations with qualified regulatory professionals and accredited testing laboratories before placing products on the Australian market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为考虑进入澳大利亚市场的食品接触材料出口商提供信息性对照工具，不构成法律意见、监管裁定、合格评定、认证结论或市场准入保证。澳大利亚食品接触材料义务分布于《食品标准法典》、州和领地食品立法、产品安全法律以及合同或零售商规范之中。制造商、进口商和分销商在向澳大利亚市场投放产品前，应与合格监管专业人士和认可检测实验室核验现行法律、标准、测试方法和执法预期。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為考慮進入澳洲市場的食品接觸材料出口商提供資訊性對照工具，不構成法律意見、監管裁定、合格評定、認證結論或市場准入保證。澳洲食品接觸材料義務分布於《食品標準法典》、州和領地食品立法、產品安全法律以及合同或零售商規範之中。製造商、進口商和分銷商在向澳洲市場投放產品前，應與合格監管專業人士和認可檢測實驗室核驗現行法律、標準、測試方法和執法預期。

answer_first.en: Australia does not operate an EU-style food-contact material authorisation or positive-list system for all packaging materials. Chinese exporters should instead demonstrate that the material will not make food unsafe or unsuitable under the Food Standards Code and state Food Acts, check contaminant limits in Standard 1.4.1, support food-business obligations under Chapter 3 standards, and use AS 2070 for plastics where buyers or regulators expect it.
answer_first.zh: 澳大利亚没有针对所有包装材料的欧盟式食品接触材料授权或正面清单制度。中国出口商应证明材料不会使食品不安全或不适宜，符合《食品标准法典》和州《食品法》的要求；核查标准1.4.1污染物限量；支持食品企业履行第3章标准义务；并在买方或监管方预期时对塑料采用AS 2070。
answer_first.zht: 澳洲沒有針對所有包裝材料的歐盟式食品接觸材料授權或正面清單制度。中國出口商應證明材料不會使食品不安全或不適宜，符合《食品標準法典》和州《食品法》的要求；核查標準1.4.1污染物限量；支持食品企業履行第3章標準義務；並在買方或監管方預期時對塑料採用AS 2070。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, government legislation register, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. foodstandards.gov.au, legislation.gov.au, and standards.org.au URLs are preferred for Australian entries. Local PDFs and unofficial summaries are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. last_verified and human_reviewed must be updated before publication as reviewed.
